languages.text: "Есть время говорить, а есть время молчать. Мудрый человек способен понять, когда наступает одно или другое. Вы — мудрый человек, {name}".
"There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."
languages.original_text: "Есть время говорить, а есть время молчать. Мудрый человек способен понять, когда наступает одно или другое. Вы — мудрый человек, {name}".

traits.locale_text: "There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."
"There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."
"There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."

languages.text: «Hay una ocasión para hablar y una ocasión para guardar silencio. Las personas sensatas saben identificarlas. Y usted es una persona sensata, {name}».
languages.original_text: "There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."

traits.locale_text: «Hay una ocasión para hablar y una ocasión para guardar silencio. Las personas sensatas saben identificarlas. Y usted es una persona sensata, {name}».

languages.text: “该说话的时候说话，该沉默的时候沉默。智者知道在不同的场合该做何种选择。而您就是智者，{name}。”
languages.original_text: "There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."

traits.locale_text: “该说话的时候说话，该沉默的时候沉默。智者知道在不同的场合该做何种选择。而您就是智者，{name}。”

languages.text: « Il y a des moments pour parler et des moments pour se taire. Les personnes avisées sont capables de les reconnaître, et vous ne manquez pas de sagesse, {name}. »
languages.original_text: "There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."

traits.locale_text: « Il y a des moments pour parler et des moments pour se taire. Les personnes avisées sont capables de les reconnaître, et vous ne manquez pas de sagesse, {name}. »

languages.text: "Konuşmanın zamanı olduğu gibi susmanın da zamanı vardır. Bilge bir kişi, durumun ne zaman hangisini gerektirdiğini bilir. Siz bilge birisiniz."
languages.original_text: "There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "Konuşmanın zamanı olduğu gibi susmanın da zamanı vardır. Bilge bir kişi, durumun ne zaman hangisini gerektirdiğini bilir. Siz bilge birisiniz."

languages.text: 「語るべき時があり、黙すべき時があります。賢い者は、いずれがその場にふさわしいかを心得ているものです。あなたは賢明な方です、{name}」
languages.original_text: "There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."

traits.locale_text: 「語るべき時があり、黙すべき時があります。賢い者は、いずれがその場にふさわしいかを心得ているものです。あなたは賢明な方です、{name}」

languages.text: "Es gibt eine Zeit, zu sprechen und eine Zeit, in der man schweigen sollte. Eine weise Person weiß, was gerade angeraten ist. Ihr seid eine weise Person, {name}."
languages.original_text: "There is a time to speak, and there is a time to be silent. A wise person knows when the occasion calls for one or the other. You are a wise person, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt eine Zeit, zu sprechen und eine Zeit, in der man schweigen sollte. Eine weise Person weiß, was gerade angeraten ist. Ihr seid eine weise Person, {name}."
